emails.subject: 12/31 Paycheck
emails.body: 12/31 Paycheck My paycheck doesn't seem to be anywhere around here. Could you let me know if my name was on the list of missing paychecks for the end of last month? Kathy Axford said she gave you such a list on 12/30. Thanks, Kate

emails.body: Re: 12/31 Paycheck I didn't see your name on the list do you have direct deposit or was it a check? Kate Symes 01/03/2001 11:10 AM
